list.title: Ventures for distribution
list.subtitle: Share your venture, get a queue number, and we'll distribute it to the community
list.addVentureLockedTitle: You need 10 points to add a venture — share your personal link!
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, story, or creator...
list.emptyNoVentures: No ventures yet. Be the first!
list.emptyNoResults: No results for the current filter.

form.title: Add a new venture
form.subtitle: Every venture is automatically assigned a distribution queue number.
form.placeholderStory: Tell us about the venture — what problem it solves, who it serves, and why it matters...
form.errLinkProtocol: Link must start with http:// or https://

locked.title: Unlock venture sharing
locked.explanation: To share a venture in the community, you need to bring 10 members who join through your personal link.
locked.scoreLine: Your score: {score}/10. {referred} members have joined so far.

feed.title: Journey log
feed.subtitle: Daily progress from the community's entrepreneurs
feed.empty: No updates yet. Be the first to share something about your journey! 🚀

composer.title: Share daily update
composer.placeholder: What progress did you make today? (up to 200 characters)
composer.tooLong: Over the limit — shorten the text
composer.errSavePost: Error saving the post. Try again.
composer.ideaPrompt1: What small step did you take forward today?
composer.ideaPrompt2: What did you learn about your product today?
composer.ideaPrompt3: What do you need help with this week?
composer.ideaPrompt4: What was the most surprising thing you discovered today?
composer.replaceConfirm: Replace the existing text with this idea?
composer.footerHint: Journey log — not a blog. Two lines that remind you how far you've come.

card.copyToast: Link copied! Paste in your story or post
